danger_signals.visual_form: Enemy generators visible on-screen; enemies emerge and move toward Opa-Opa
danger_signals.meaning: Active threat present; player must destroy generator to clear level

danger_signals.visual_form: Large enemy entity at end of level after all generators destroyed
danger_signals.meaning: Escalated danger; final obstacle before level completion

danger_signals.visual_form: Bullets/attacks fired by enemies toward player character
Enemy minions and invading forces visible in environment
danger_signals.meaning: Hostile occupation of Fantasy Zone; direct threat requiring combat

safety_signals.visual_form: Destroyed generators no longer spawn enemies
safety_signals.meaning: Zone of level is secure; reduced threat intensity

safety_signals.visual_form: Shining coins dropped by defeated enemies, glow/sparkle effect
safety_signals.meaning: Resource availability; opportunity to purchase upgrades and gain advantage

safety_signals.visual_form: Opa-Opa visual changes when equipped (weapon glow, speed indicators, lighting aura)
safety_signals.meaning: Enhanced capability; improved safety through stronger offensive/defensive posture

faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Protagonist controls movement left/right; associated with Fantasy Zone restoration

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Varying enemy types with different visual designs; different gold drop values suggest enemy hierarchy
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Present as enemy generators and boss entities; occupy Fantasy Zone as invaders

faction_indicators.color_identity: Wide, vibrant color palette noted in reviews
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Level environments with distinct visual themes; colorful, cute aesthetic contrasts with dark invasion threat

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Enemy generators visible on-screen; minions actively spawning and patrolling
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies move and attack; generators continue producing threats until destroyed

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Generator entity disappears; enemy spawn ceases in that zone
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Enemies stop appearing from that location; area becomes progressively safer

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Boss entity appears at end of level; final confrontation arena
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss performs unique attack patterns; level progresses to final challenge

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Player character displays visual modification (enhanced weapon effects, speed aura, lighting enhancement)
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Improved offensive output; faster movement; wider coverage/range depending on upgrade type

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Boss defeated; transition to next level with new environment and enemies
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Fantasy Zone progressively liberated from Dark Menon occupation

environmental_storytelling.example: Each level features distinct visual theming/environments suggesting different regions of Fantasy Zone; cute, colorful design establishes peaceful setting invaded by dark forces
Different enemies drop varying amounts of gold, suggesting enemy importance/threat level; resources scattered across environment indicate ongoing conflict and opportunities for player advantage
Opa-Opa (cute winged spaceship) visually contrasts with Dark Menon minions; hero vs. invader conflict communicated through visual aesthetic difference
Visual elimination of threat-spawning structures demonstrates player agency in restoring order; each destroyed generator is visual proof of progress

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Flies or walks on ground; responds to player input; scrolls left/right based on direction
Fires weapons at enemies; collects gold drops; navigates to target generators
Enhanced weapon firing patterns (wide spread, rear fire, laser); increased speed; improved lighting
Move across screen; fire projectiles at Opa-Opa; drop gold when destroyed
Continuously spawn minions; visible target for player destruction
Unique attack patterns; appears only after all generators destroyed; final obstacle per level

notes: Super Fantasy Zone uses colorful, 'cute' aesthetic to establish Fantasy Zone as idyllic setting under invasion by Dark Menon forces. Visual communication relies heavily on environmental contrast (vibrant vs. dark), character design (hero spaceship vs. enemy minions), and destruction progression (eliminated generators = cleared zones). The game's 'laid back' visual style creates tension with its challenging gameplay. Shmup paradigm means danger is communicated primarily through enemy positioning, attack patterns, and collision hazards rather than dramatic environmental changes. World-state is primarily conveyed through entity presence/absence rather than environmental transformation.
